The '''Voidwaker''' from [[Last Man Standing]] is a minigame-exclusive variant of the normal [[Voidwaker]]. It can be obtained by opening [[Chest (Last Man Standing)|chests]] with a [[bloodier key]], or looting the [[Crate (Last Man Standing)|crates]] that spawn at random locations on the map. On death, it is dropped to the player who killed you.

==Special attack==
[[File:Disrupt.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the Voidwaker's special attack, ''Disrupt''.]]
The Voidwaker has a [[special attack]], ''Disrupt'', which consumes 50% of the player's special attack energy. The special attack deals [[successful hit|guaranteed]] Magic damage between 50-150% of the wielder's maximum melee hit.
